_doc: Generic documented JSON example for asm-cov.py.
Required top-level sections: target, commands.
Optional top-level sections: results_dir, tools, symbols, outputs, behavior, paths.
Placeholders use Python format syntax: {name}.
Available placeholders include matrix keys ({arch}, {algo}, ...) and {target_image}.
Auto-derived per-axis placeholders: {axis_slug}, {axis_mapped}.
--symbol-file overrides symbols at runtime.
--generate-symbol-file is standalone and requires --image-path.
Path resolution: all paths inside this config (results_dir, target.image_path,
symbols.path, paths.prepend_path[]) may be absolute or relative; relative
paths resolve against the directory of this config file.
Paths passed on the CLI resolve against the current working directory.
Required: image_path + image_match.
image_path may be absolute or relative to this config file,
e.g. "../build/lib/libmycrypto.so".
image_match.type supports: contains, regex, basename.
Required: executable, args_template, matrix_axes, result_subdir_template.
Each matrix_axes entry must be a non-empty array.

value_maps._doc: Optional. Maps raw values to friendly tokens used by {axis_mapped}.

_doc: Optional. If omitted, defaults are used.
Default emulator.command_template: ["setarch","--addr-no-randomize","sde64","-{arch}"]
Default disassembler.command_template: ["xed64","-no-resync","-s",".text","-I","-i","{target_image}"]
Optional. If omitted, mode defaults to "generate".
Modes: provided | generate | command.
mode=provided requires path.
mode=command requires command_template.
Each command_template entry is rendered with str.format(**context);
literal '{' / '}' (e.g. awk actions) must be doubled to '{{' / '}}'.
The only supported placeholder is {target_image}.
ignore is an optional list of fnmatch-style glob patterns (case-sensitive);
symbols matching any pattern are skipped during coverage analysis.
Optional output names (shown with defaults).
All result_* files and per-command MIX subdirs are placed under <results_dir>/<data_dir>/.
The HTML report (report_dir) is placed directly under <results_dir>/.
parallel_jobs controls emulator parallelism; CLI -j/--parallel-jobs overrides.

paths._doc: Optional PATH prefixes. Add sde64/xed64 locations if not already in system PATH.
